title: Thoughts and Things 2/3/2024
html:
Saturday morning in new morning bakery in corvallis. Yahir is junior at oregon state, talking with sam solum, griffin davis is visiting, dad and sister birthdays in 4 days, kyle is subtly mad. Nervous about a party that night — the flyer is circulating in eugene circles. He coaches himself back into breath as anchor and present-moment ethic.

TL;DR

  • First mention of sam solum in this slice — friend/social context, corvallis life.
  • griffin davis visiting from out of town; party flyer leaked to eugene circles induces "calm before the storm" anxiety.
  • breathwork surfaces as Yahir's go-to anxiety regulator — recurring 2024 motif.
  • Self-frame: "I often feel like a fraud cause in many ways i am" — early articulation of imposter frame.

sam solum · griffin davis · kyle · corvallis · new morning bakery · breathwork · imposter frame
